name: Maxtor Messaging Workshop: Creating the Midline Market Category
description: Full slide deck from the February 13 2004 Maxtor midline category creation workshop at Shrewsbury MA. Covers Aberdeen's ILM and Pools of Storage framework, competitive analysis of Seagate/WD/Hitachi, the 10-step category creation methodology, a detailed market awareness-building roadmap with quarterly milestones, and competitive positioning analysis of MaXLine vs Atlas disk drives.

creator.name: Aberdeen Group (Peter Kastner, David Hill, John Boyne)
